tasks.subject: Task 1: folders.yaml 오버레이 + 폴더별 프롬프트 (config.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FolderRoute.prompt / TomboyConfig.default_prompt 필드 추가, load_config가 folders.yaml 오버레이, TomboyConfig.prompt_for(source_folder) 헬퍼. Full code in plan doc Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/config.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_config.py", ".gitignore", "pipeline/.gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/lib/test_config.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FolderRoute.prompt + TomboyConfig.default_prompt", "folders.yaml overlay precedence", "absent file = current behavior", "prompt_for precedence folder>default>None", "gitignore folders.yaml"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: OCR 백엔드 per-call system_prompt 오버라이드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OCRBackend.ocr에 system_prompt=None 추가; claude/local_vlm override + prompt_hash 재계산. 미지정 시 생성자 기본값(하위호환). Full code in plan doc Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/base.py", "pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/claude.py", "pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/local_vlm.py", "pipeline/tests/ocr_backends/test_claude.py", "pipeline/tests/ocr_backends/test_local_vlm.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ocr_backends/ -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ocr(system_prompt=None) backward-compatible", "override applied to both backends", "prompt_hash reflects override"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: s3가 폴더별 프롬프트 해석·전달
tasks.description:
**Goal:** s3_ocr.run_ocr이 source_folder로 프롬프트 골라 backend.ocr(png, system_prompt=...) 전달; main()이 cfg.tomboy.prompt_for 주입. Full code in plan doc Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s3_ocr.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s3_ocr.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s3_ocr.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["run_ocr prompt_for param", "per-page source_folder resolution", "None default = current behavior", "main wires cfg.tomboy.prompt_for"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: trigger 서버 GET/PUT /config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** trigger_server.py ConfigStore(read=effective, write=folders.yaml 원자적) + Bearer GET/PUT /config; pipeline.yaml 불변; title_format 플레이스홀더 검증. Full code in plan doc Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/trigger_server.py", "pipeline/tests/test_trigger_server_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_trigger_server_config.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read_effective shape + prompt-file fallback", "validate placeholders+types", "write atomic, pipeline.yaml untouched", "GET/PUT /config auth + status codes + CORS PUT"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 앱 trigger 클라이언트 — fetch/save config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** remarkablePipeline.ts에 fetchPipelineConfig/savePipelineConfig + 타입; normalizeBaseUrl+Bearer 재사용; 네버-스로우. Full code in plan doc Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/admin/remarkablePipeline.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/admin/remarkablePipelineConfig.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/admin/remarkablePipelineConfig.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PipelineConfig/PipelineFolderConfig types", "fetchPipelineConfig parse+errors", "savePipelineConfig PUT+400 message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 설정 UI — DiaryOcrSettings + 리마커블 탭 + 가이드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 설정 리마커블 탭에 일기 OCR 파이프라인 설정 섹션(기본 프롬프트+폴더 카드+추가+저장) + 가이드 카드. Full code in plan doc Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/remarkable/DiaryOcrSettings.svelte", "app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte", "app/tests/unit/lib/remarkable/diaryOcrSettings.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/remarkable/diaryOcrSettings.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load trigger url/token + fetch config", "default prompt + per-folder cards", "add-folder + tablet warning", "save->toast", "remarkable tab render + guide card"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 전체 회귀 + 문서 동기화
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 파이프라인+앱 전체 회귀, tomboy-diary 스킬 한 단락 반영. Full steps in plan doc Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/skills/tomboy-diary/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q && cd ../app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pipeline full suite pass", "app check 0 errors", "tomboy-diary skill paragraph added"]}
```
